PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Primer, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Petitioner discuss and confirm what exactly the court expects of him should the court grant his petition and appoint him Executor of the Estate. The court confirms with Petitioner regarding the personal property that is mentioned in his petition. After additional discussion and there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May-02-2017 is admitted to probate. Robert Primer is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status of Filing the Inventory and Appraisal is set for Jul-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for May-15-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
